Gopee2024.title: A prenatal skin atlas reveals immune regulation of human skin morphogenesis
Gopee2024.role: Atlas paper - primary source for TML macrophage characterization

Suo2022.title: Mapping the developing human immune system across organs
Suo2022.role: Source of macrophage subset marker genes used for annotation; identified microglia-like TREM2hi macrophages across developing organs

Bian2020.title: Deciphering human macrophage development at single-cell resolution
Bian2020.role: Described yolk-sac derived TREM2+ macrophages with microglia-like expression profile in developing organs

Goh2023.title: Yolk sac cell atlas reveals multiorgan functions during human early development
Goh2023.role: Identified yolk-sac derived TREM2+ macrophages shared across developing organs including skin

GarciaAlonso2022.title: Single-cell roadmap of human gonadal development
GarciaAlonso2022.role: Identified TREM2+ microglia-like macrophages in developing gonads with transcriptomic profile identical to brain microglia

Kolter2020.title: Origin and Differentiation of Nerve-Associated Macrophages
Kolter2020.role: Described nerve-associated macrophages in mouse skin that mirror functions of brain microglia

Henn2021.title: Xenogeneic skin transplantation promotes angiogenesis and tissue regeneration through activated Trem2+ macrophages
Henn2021.role: Demonstrated TREM2+ macrophages promote angiogenesis and tissue regeneration in skin transplantation

Liang2024.title: Dynamic pathological analysis reveals a protective role against skin fibrosis for TREM2-dependent macrophages
Liang2024.role: Showed TREM2+ macrophages protect against skin fibrosis; disease-associated TREM2+ macrophages exhibit overlapping signatures with fetal skin counterparts

Zhu2024.title: Trem2 acts as a non-classical receptor of interleukin-4 to promote diabetic wound healing
Zhu2024.role: Demonstrated macrophage-specific Trem2 regulates anti-inflammatory polarization and wound healing in skin

Du2017.title: Synaptotagmin-11 inhibits cytokine secretion and phagocytosis in microglia
Du2017.role: Characterized SYT11 as an immunomodulatory gene in microglia regulating IL-6 production
